---
title: "Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

# Campaign Performance

This dashboard uses sample campaign performance data to show how a digital marketing campaign could track reach, engagement, clicks, and engagement rate across platforms. It connects to influencer and social media campaign work because these are common metrics used to compare platform performance.

```{r}
#| label: campaign-data

campaign_data <- data.frame(
  platform = c("Instagram", "TikTok", "Email", "Website"),
  reach = c(18000, 42000, 6000, 9500),
  engagement = c(1450, 5200, 720, 1100),
  clicks = c(430, 1250, 310, 520)
)

campaign_data
```

## Row

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Reach"

sum(campaign_data$reach)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Engagement"

sum(campaign_data$engagement)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Clicks"

sum(campaign_data$clicks)
```

## Row

```{r}
barplot(
  campaign_data$reach,
  names.arg = campaign_data$platform,
  main = "Reach by Platform",
  xlab = "Platform",
  ylab = "Reach"
)
```

```{r}
barplot(
  campaign_data$engagement,
  names.arg = campaign_data$platform,
  main = "Engagement by Platform",
  xlab = "Platform",
  ylab = "Engagement"
)
```

## Row

```{r}
engagement_rate <- campaign_data$engagement / campaign_data$reach

barplot(
  engagement_rate,
  names.arg = campaign_data$platform,
  main = "Engagement Rate by Platform",
  xlab = "Platform",
  ylab = "Engagement Rate"
)
```

```{r}
campaign_data[order(campaign_data$clicks, decreasing = TRUE), ]
```
